checkpoints.summary: Smoke checkpoint for Narada proper agent-context memory MCP first slice.

Operator explicitly authorized execution despite Architect role. Claimed task 20260514-1267-review-and-repair-agent-carrier-factorization-handoff-from-n. Execution is blocked in this session because no local shell/file-read/search tool is exposed, and connected GitHub repository search/list returns no Narada repository. Cannot review commits 4744f0de and bf12b0f7 or inspect Codex/Kimi carrier materialization without guessing. Added Builder-ready chapters for Claude Code and Narada-native carriers earlier, admitted as tasks 20260515-001-agent-carrier-claude-code and 20260515-002-agent-carrier-narada-native.

Operator requested User Site narada-andrey prepare a lift package for full Inquiry Space machinery. Current Narada proper MCP session does not expose the newly implemented inbox cross-Site submission tools, though local repo inspection confirms packages/narada-proper-mcp now contains inbox_submit_observation, inbox_submit_typed_envelope, inbox_stage_submission_workflow, narada_inbox_* aliases, canonical_inbox_cross_site_submission gating, surface registry entries, and tests. tool_search in this running session still returns no matching tools, so relaunch/rebind is needed before using inbox_stage_submission_workflow. Current available checkpoint tool is agent_context_memory_record_checkpoint. After relaunch, verify MCP tool exposure, dry-run cross-Site inbox submission to C:\Users\Andrey\Narada if sending from Narada proper is still desired, and avoid broad cleanup of the dirty Narada proper worktree.

Checkpoint before operator restarts Codex session. Current locus is Narada proper at D:\code\narada, authority_locus narada_proper, agent narada.architect. User preference/tool hierarchy is MCP-specific commands first, MCP shell second when no specific command exists, native shell last. Recent completed task: 1507 Adopt doctrinal grounding MCP command from narada-andrey lift package. Implemented replacement of narada_doctrine_grounding_refs with agent_context_doctrinal_grounding(mode: reground, optional doctrine_ids/question/require_inquiry_space_data) in packages/narada-proper-mcp/src/server.ts and surface-registry.ts; updated tests and docs. Verified @narada2/narada-proper-mcp test/typecheck/build passed; fresh MCP tools/list exposes agent_context_doctrinal_grounding; fresh tools/call mode=reground returns narada.agent_context.doctrinal_grounding.v0 with posture_summary, doctrine_catalog, doctrine_filter, ccc_coordinates, ias_mapping, review_protocol, authority_limits, and private Inquiry Space refusal posture. Task 1507 is closed and confirmed; lifecycle snapshot exported and fresh. Important caveat: this current Codex session's loaded MCP tool list may remain stale until restart/reload, even though fresh MCP runtime exposes the new tool. User will restart and may ask whether checkpoint structure captures everything needed. Answer should distinguish compact checkpoint summary from full transcript: it captures current locus, identity, completed task, verification, caveats, and next-continuity hooks, but not every shell output or full diff; those remain in Git/worktree/task evidence.

Checkpoint after repairing Narada proper MCP doctrine grounding corpus parity. Current locus is Narada proper at D:\code\narada, authority_locus narada_proper, agent narada.architect. Operator reported that doctrines should match narada-andrey's shared corpus in D:\code\thoughts. Diagnosis: previous agent_context_doctrinal_grounding adopted the command shape but used a hardcoded Narada proper local catalog. Implemented read-only external thoughts concept corpus grounding in packages/narada-proper-mcp/src/server.ts: command now resolves ../thoughts/content/concepts relative to Site root, with NARADA_DOCTRINE_CORPUS_ROOT / doctrineCorpusRoot override support, enumerates markdown concept files, extracts frontmatter title/description, supports doctrine_id filtering, and reports doctrine_source with primary_corpus, primary_corpus_kind external_thoughts_concepts, ref authority false, availability, and missing index refs. It keeps local Narada proper refs only as supplemental, does not import private Inquiry Space data, and remains advisory/read-only. Added focused test coverage in packages/narada-proper-mcp/test/narada-proper-mcp.test.ts using a temp corpus to avoid CI dependence on D:\code\thoughts. Verification passed: pnpm --filter @narada2/narada-proper-mcp test (28 tests), typecheck, and build. Fresh built MCP process call for doctrine_ids [intelligence_authority_separation] returned D:/code/thoughts/content/concepts/intelligence-authority-separation.md and doctrine_source primary_corpus D:\code\thoughts\content\concepts. Caveat: the already-loaded MCP process in this chat is stale and still returns the old catalog until MCP reload/restart. Worktree already had many unrelated dirty changes; touched files for this work are packages/narada-proper-mcp/src/server.ts and packages/narada-proper-mcp/test/narada-proper-mcp.test.ts.
